MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Parviz Darabi, Esq. (650-343-5357) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held in chambers. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF EDILBERTO AGUILAR-PACHECO is GRANTED.

Moving party to submit a proposed order on Mandatory Judicial Council form.
